source_pr.title: store: add missed KV variables when committing the secondary keys
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Shuaipeng Yu <jackysp@gmail.com>

<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
The KV variables contain adjustments for the backoff maximum time. In general, the secondary keys don't matter even if they are not adjusted with the primary key. However, it would be better to feel adjusted to be consistent.

### What is changed and how it works?
Add missed KV variables when committing the secondary keys.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

symptoms: - // potential data race in unit test since `CommitMaxBackoff` will be updated
failure_signature: - // potential data race in unit test since `CommitMaxBackoff` will be updated
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness risk is tied to concurrent/asynchronous execution during 2PC commit: secondary-key commits run in a background goroutine, and unit tests may update backoff-related variables (e.g. `CommitMaxBackoff`) which can trigger potential data races or inconsistent behavior if the backoffer is not constructed with the correct per-txn KV variables. The PR stabilizes this path by creating the secondary backoffer with the transaction variables (`NewBackoffer(...).WithVars(c.txn.vars)`), ensuring secondary commits use the same KV settings as the primary and reducing race-prone inconsistency in tests.
fix_pattern: When launching background work (e.g. secondary-key commits) that depends on per-txn KV settings, propagate the transaction variables into the backoff/retry machinery (e.g. `WithVars(txn.vars)`) to keep behavior consistent and avoid race-prone test flakiness.

evidence: evidence: - // potencial data race in unit test since `CommitMaxBackoff` will be updated

analysis:
